reviews.comment:
Cargué nafta dos veces. Nunca pude obtener el descuento para socios del ACA.  Nadie se empobrece por eso, pero duele el orgullo, después de haber pagado la cuota durante 40 años.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with gas twice. I was never able to get the ACA member discount. Nobody gets poorer because of it, but it hurts my pride, after having paid my dues for 40 years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvOWJ6T0dnEAE

reviews.comment:
Una estación nueva qué tiene todo en condiciones.
Playeros muy correctos en el cumplimiento de su tarea.
Los sanitarios están muy bien mantenidos, limpios y con los elementos necesarios.
Tiene un área de cafetería y comprás bastante surtida.
Reciben débito. Parecen tener pocos clientes fuera de los de la zona.

(Translated by Google)
A new station that's in great condition.
The attendants are very professional and efficient.
The restrooms are very well maintained, clean, and fully equipped.
It has a cafeteria and a fairly well-stocked shop. They accept debit cards. They seem to have few customers outside the local area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJOVlTQTdnRRAB
